about.title: About
about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.paragraph1: Hi! I'm Seba Gedeon, a passionate full-stack software engineer specializing in building robust and scalable applications. My expertise spans mobile, web, backend, desktop development, data integration, and DevOps.
about.paragraph2: I bring deep technical expertise in application security, permission systems, and authentication. Whether developing high-performance mobile apps, scalable backends, or secure DevOps infrastructures, I master the entire software development chain.
about.paragraph3: Let's work together to bring your projects to life with custom, secure, and high-performance solutions.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you

items.title: Mobile & Web Development
items.description: Native and cross-platform mobile apps, modern responsive web applications. Expertise in React Native, Flutter, React, Vue.js.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.description: Robust backends, RESTful and GraphQL APIs, microservices and distributed architectures. Node.js, Python, Java and databases.

items.title: Desktop & Integration
items.description: Cross-platform desktop applications and data integration solutions. Electron, .NET, third-party API integration.

items.title: Security & Auth
items.description: Secure authentication systems, permission management, OAuth, JWT, encryption and application security best practices.

items.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
items.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, monitoring and automated cloud deployment (AWS, Azure, GCP).

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can collaborate to create innovative technical solutions.

hero.name: I'm Seba Gedeon
hero.description: A full-stack software engineer who builds robust, scalable applications. I specialize in mobile, web, and backend development, with expertise in modern frameworks, cloud deployment, and secure solutions.
